string.text: {=Yp6ERgMv}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=XpGN4tpC}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, one of the ancient lineages of Europe.
{=NNxDWfRW}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME} one of the ancient lineages of Castile.

{=8nxZum89}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of the Castilians.
{=J8BxCgtu}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. The fame of our family is second to none in the songs of Europe.
{=MQwL3Nrr}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. There's not a Heathen family who hasn't contributed the head of one of their champions to our collection!
